data.title: EMax investors partially win in class-action lawsuit against 3 celebs as four state-level lawsuits allowed to proceed by CA judge.
data.description: A California judge has given the green light for four state-level lawsuits against three celebrities and individuals associated with the EMAX token to move forward. This decision allows legal action to proceed in the case, signaling potential repercussions for those involved.

data.title: NVR, Inc. authorized to repurchase $750 million of its common stock, no expiration date.
data.description: In a recent announcement on August 8, 2025, NVR, Inc. (NYSE: NVR) based in Reston, Virginia, shared that their Board of Directors has approved a plan to repurchase a total of $750 million worth of their common stock. This repurchase authorization is set with no specified expiration date, allowing the company flexibility in managing its capital structure. The purchases will...

data.title: Tickets for Spirit of Halloweentown 2025 festival go on sale on August 11 at 10:00 AM PST. Held in St. Helens, Oregon, the event celebrates all things spooky and nostalgic, drawing thousands of fans to the actual filming location of Halloweentown.
data.description: St. Helens, Oregon is once again hosting the popular Halloween event, Spirit of Halloweentown 2025. The month-long festival will celebrate spooky and nostalgic themes. Tickets for the event will be available for purchase starting on Monday, August 11 at 10:00 AM PST on the official website, www.spiritofhalloweentown.com. This event takes place in the filming location of the famous Disney Channel movie, Halloweentown, attracting thousands of fans from around the country to St. Helens, Oregon each fall.

data.title: URJ, CCAR, and ACC issue statement regarding Israel's war on Hamas, quoting Deuteronomy.
data.description: In a poignant message before his passing, Moses urged "Choose life, that you and your offspring may live." (Deuteronomy 30:19) This sentiment resonates today as the State of Israel grapples with critical decisions. The event took place in New York on August 8, 2025.

data.title: Flint Hills Trail State Park in Kansas named one of nation's top trails for community benefits and history. Washington, Aug 8, 2025.
data.description: The Rails to Trails Conservancy has recognized a trail for its exceptional community benefits and picturesque opportunities to explore the outdoors and discover the area's history. This accolade was awarded on August 8, 2025. The Rails to Trails Conservancy is known as the largest advocate for trails, walking, and bicycling in the country.

data.title: Skydance Animation joins ASWF as Premier Member on Aug 8, 2025, advancing open source software development in the film industry.
data.description: On August 8, 2025, in Los Angeles, the Academy Software Foundation (ASWF), a leading organization in the motion picture industry dedicated to promoting open source software development, announced that Skydance Animation has joined as the newest Premier Member. This move signifies a significant milestone for ASWF, highlighting its commitment to fostering collaboration and innovation within the industry. The addition of Skydance Animation further strengthens ASWF's membership base, which now stands at an impressive number. The partnership with Skydance Animation underscores the company's dedication to leveraging open source software to drive advancements in filmmaking technology.

data.title: USPS announces temporary price change for 2025 holiday season to cover extra handling costs.
data.description: On August 8, 2025, in Washington, the U.S. Postal Service made an announcement through PRNewswire regarding a temporary price alteration for select package services during the upcoming 2025 peak holiday period. The Postal Regulatory Commission (PRC) has been notified about this change, which aims to address the additional handling costs expected during this busy season. The adjustment in prices is intended to assist in managing the surge in packages and ensuring efficient service.

data.title: DentScribe CoPilot is revolutionizing SOAP notes for mom-dentists, reducing after-hours work and mental strain. Dr. Kristina Zoulas benefits.
data.description: A dentist and mother, Dr. Kristina Zoulas from Berkeley Dental Studio based in Sunnyvale, California, has revolutionized the process of charting SOAP notes for busy mom-dentists. Previously, this task required working after hours and much mental effort. Dr. Zoulas, who is also a member of Mommy Dentists in Business network, has transformed this process.

data.title: Berger Montague urges Rocket Pharmaceuticals (RCKT) investors to act by Aug 11 in securities lawsuit.默认
data.description: On August 8, 2025, Berger Montague PC, a prominent law firm in Philadelphia specializing in investor representation, disclosed the filing of a securities class action lawsuit against Rocket Pharmaceuticals, Inc. The lawsuit targets Rocket Pharmaceuticals, operating under the ticker symbol RCKT on the NASDAQ exchange. The legal action stems from allegations against the company regarding its financial practices and disclosures.

data.title: NTEC returns 2,211 acres of Navajo land leased for coal mining since 1957 back to the Navajo Nation, first-ever in history.
data.description: In Farmington, New Mexico, Navajo Transitional Energy Company (NTEC) has made a significant announcement regarding the return of a 2,211-acre parcel of Navajo land that was initially leased for mining in 1957. This marks a historic moment as NTEC becomes the first mining company to completely restore coal mine land to current environmental standards, enabling its release from Bureau of Indian Affairs (BIA) oversight back to the Navajo Nation. The parcel is situated at the north end of NTEC’s Navajo Mine within the Nenahnezad Chap.

data.title: GrowGeneration (NASDAQ: GRWG) upcoming earnings release on Monday with expected EPS of $-0.11. Bulls hope for positive guidance.
data.description: GrowGeneration (GRWG) is set to announce its quarterly earnings on Monday, August 11, 2025. Analysts predict an EPS of -$0.11. Investors will be looking for the company to surpass this forecast and offer optimistic guidance for future growth. The full report can be found on Benzinga.com.
